title: Workspace Capability Layer
description: Contract for a WorkspaceToolkit capability layer (layers/<name>/layer.json). Consumed by the add-layer and new-workspace tooling to resolve layer dependencies, compatibility, and prerequisites.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, enabling editor autocomplete and validation.

name.description: Layer identifier, matching the layers/<name>/ directory name.

family.description: Mutually-exclusive selection group this layer belongs to (e.g. 'ioc', 'testing', 'mocking'). Only one layer per family is applied to a workspace. Optional — present only on layers that participate in a family.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the layer provides.

dependencies.description: Names of other layers that must be applied before this one. Empty array means no dependencies.

compatibleWith.description: Workspace types (manifest names, e.g. 'base', 'dotnet') this layer can be applied to.

prerequisites.description: External tools required for this layer. Empty array means none.

name.description: Tool name (may include a parenthetical note on scope).

check.description: Shell command that verifies the tool is present (non-zero exit means missing).

remediation.description: Human-readable remediation guidance, often expanding on 'install' with alternatives. Optional.
